flashcards.definition: Comparing total cost of renting (rent + renter's insurance) vs. buying (mortgage, taxes, insurance, maintenance, opportunity cost of down payment) over time.
Purchase price + insurance + gas + maintenance + depreciation − resale value = true cost of a vehicle over ownership period.
(Lifetime earnings with degree − lifetime earnings without − total college cost) / total college cost × 100.
Using FV of annuity formula to determine monthly savings needed to reach a target retirement nest egg.
Guideline that retirees can withdraw 4% of their portfolio in year 1 (adjusting for inflation) with high probability of money lasting 30+ years.
